patches.find: Standard spherical geodesy achieves sub-meter precision globally with two parameters; the dome needs four and still cannot handle trans-hemispheric routes.
patches.replace: Standard spherical geodesy achieves sub-millimetre precision globally with two parameters; the dome needs four and still cannot handle trans-hemispheric routes.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c6 review found tldr_verdict still says sub-meter while all other layers (tldr_evidence, detail_evidence, detail_verdict_text) say sub-millimetre. Completes the precision alignment identified in c5.
